mapper.select:
SELECT t.*, t1.real_name create_user_name, t2.name create_dept_name, t3.name create_post_name FROM tmp_demo t LEFT OUTER JOIN castle_sys_user t1 ON t.create_user = t1.id LEFT OUTER JOIN castle_sys_dept t2 ON t.create_dept = t2.id LEFT OUTER JOIN castle_sys_post t3 ON t.create_post = t3.id WHERE t.is_deleted = 2
AND t.id like concat('%',#{tmpDemoEntity.id},'%')
AND t.name like concat('%',#{tmpDemoEntity.name},'%')
AND t.content like concat('%',#{tmpDemoEntity.content},'%')
AND t.auth like concat('%',#{tmpDemoEntity.auth},'%')
AND t.phone like concat('%',#{tmpDemoEntity.phone},'%')
AND t.email like concat('%',#{tmpDemoEntity.email},'%')
AND t.images like concat('%',#{tmpDemoEntity.images},'%')
AND t.files like concat('%',#{tmpDemoEntity.files},'%')
AND t.video like concat('%',#{tmpDemoEntity.video},'%')
AND t.longitude like concat('%',#{tmpDemoEntity.longitude},'%')
AND t.latitude like concat('%',#{tmpDemoEntity.latitude},'%')
AND t.vue_number like concat('%',#{tmpDemoEntity.vueNumber},'%')
AND t.vue_radio like concat('%',#{tmpDemoEntity.vueRadio},'%')
AND t.vue_textarea like concat('%',#{tmpDemoEntity.vueTextarea},'%')
AND t.vue_checkbox like concat('%',#{tmpDemoEntity.vueCheckbox},'%')
AND t.vue_select like concat('%',#{tmpDemoEntity.vueSelect},'%')
AND t.vue_date like concat('%',#{tmpDemoEntity.vueDate},'%')
AND t.vue_datetime like concat('%',#{tmpDemoEntity.vueDatetime},'%')
AND t.status like concat('%',#{tmpDemoEntity.status},'%')
AND t.create_user like concat('%',#{tmpDemoEntity.createUser},'%')
AND t.create_dept like concat('%',#{tmpDemoEntity.createDept},'%')
AND t.create_post like concat('%',#{tmpDemoEntity.createPost},'%')
AND t.create_time like concat('%',#{tmpDemoEntity.createTime},'%')
AND t.update_user like concat('%',#{tmpDemoEntity.updateUser},'%')
AND t.update_time like concat('%',#{tmpDemoEntity.updateTime},'%')
AND t.is_deleted like concat('%',#{tmpDemoEntity.isDeleted},'%')
order by create_time desc
limit #{map.offset},#{map.rows}

SELECT count(1) FROM tmp_demo t WHERE t.is_deleted = 2
AND t.id like concat('%',#{tmpDemoEntity.id},'%')
AND t.name like concat('%',#{tmpDemoEntity.name},'%')
AND t.content like concat('%',#{tmpDemoEntity.content},'%')
AND t.auth like concat('%',#{tmpDemoEntity.auth},'%')
AND t.phone like concat('%',#{tmpDemoEntity.phone},'%')
AND t.email like concat('%',#{tmpDemoEntity.email},'%')
AND t.images like concat('%',#{tmpDemoEntity.images},'%')
AND t.files like concat('%',#{tmpDemoEntity.files},'%')
AND t.video like concat('%',#{tmpDemoEntity.video},'%')
AND t.longitude like concat('%',#{tmpDemoEntity.longitude},'%')
AND t.latitude like concat('%',#{tmpDemoEntity.latitude},'%')
AND t.vue_number like concat('%',#{tmpDemoEntity.vueNumber},'%')
AND t.vue_radio like concat('%',#{tmpDemoEntity.vueRadio},'%')
AND t.vue_textarea like concat('%',#{tmpDemoEntity.vueTextarea},'%')
AND t.vue_checkbox like concat('%',#{tmpDemoEntity.vueCheckbox},'%')
AND t.vue_select like concat('%',#{tmpDemoEntity.vueSelect},'%')
AND t.vue_date like concat('%',#{tmpDemoEntity.vueDate},'%')
AND t.vue_datetime like concat('%',#{tmpDemoEntity.vueDatetime},'%')
AND t.status like concat('%',#{tmpDemoEntity.status},'%')
AND t.create_user like concat('%',#{tmpDemoEntity.createUser},'%')
AND t.create_dept like concat('%',#{tmpDemoEntity.createDept},'%')
AND t.create_post like concat('%',#{tmpDemoEntity.createPost},'%')
AND t.create_time like concat('%',#{tmpDemoEntity.createTime},'%')
AND t.update_user like concat('%',#{tmpDemoEntity.updateUser},'%')
AND t.update_time like concat('%',#{tmpDemoEntity.updateTime},'%')
AND t.is_deleted like concat('%',#{tmpDemoEntity.isDeleted},'%')

SELECT t.*, t1.real_name create_user_name FROM tmp_demo t LEFT OUTER JOIN castle_sys_user t1 ON t.create_user = t1.id LEFT OUTER JOIN castle_sys_dept t2 ON t.create_dept = t2.id LEFT OUTER JOIN castle_sys_post t3 ON t.create_post = t3.id WHERE t.is_deleted = 2 AND t.id = #{id}
